headline: PPG’s Harshberger, Solcz earn STEP Ahead Awards from the Manufacturing Institute
summary: PITTSBURGH, March 09, 2026--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced that employees Laura Harshberger and Jennifer Solcz have been recognized with 2026 STEP Ahead Awards from the Manufacturing Institute for their exemplary leadership and industry achievements.
